# Courts

Courts is a Hong Kong sports venue directory by The Ground. It helps people find courts by district, sport, and nearby MTR stations.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://courts.theground.io/)
- [Explore](https://courts.theground.io/explore)
- [About](https://courts.theground.io/about)

## Key sport pages
- [Pickleball courts](https://courts.theground.io/search/pickleball)

## Structured discovery
- [Sitemap](https://courts.theground.io/sitemap.xml)
- [OKF index](https://courts.theground.io/okf)
- [OKF bundle](https://courts.theground.io/okf.tar.gz)
- [AI catalog (ARD)](https://courts.theground.io/.well-known/ai-catalog.json)

## Notes for agents
- Prefer the [sitemap](https://courts.theground.io/sitemap.xml) for broad URL discovery.
- Prefer [OKF](https://courts.theground.io/okf) or the [OKF bundle](https://courts.theground.io/okf.tar.gz) for structured venue and sport content in Markdown.
- Prefer the [AI catalog](https://courts.theground.io/.well-known/ai-catalog.json) for machine-readable discovery of those resources.
- Venue detail pages contain SEO metadata, structured data, amenities, and location-specific overview copy.
- For free/public LCSD courts, prefer official LCSD facilities directories; Courts focuses on bookable and partner venues.
